title: CustomDeaths
description: A plugin which replaces the traditional death messages
body:
**CustomDeaths: Elevate Your Minecraft Server's Death Experience** CustomDeaths transforms the mundane vanilla death messages into engaging, humorous, and customizable notifications that add personality to your server. Rather than the standard "Player fell from a high place," your community can experience witty messages like "Player found out gravity still works" or "Player forgot they weren't wearing an elytra." **Key Features:** Fully Customizable Messages: Create unique death messages for every possible way a player can meet their end in Minecraft. Category-Based Organization: Messages are organized by death type (PvP, fall damage, drowning, etc.) making configuration intuitive. Random Message Selection: Each death type can have multiple messages, with one randomly selected each time for variety. Color Support: Full support for Minecraft color codes to make death messages stand out. Player & World Variables: Include the player's name and current world in death messages using simple variables. Prefix Customization: Add an optional prefix to all death messages for consistent branding. Simple Commands: Reload configuration on-the-fly without server restarts. Permission System: Control who can use administrative commands. Lightweight Implementation: Minimal performance impact on your server. ** Why Choose CustomDeaths?** This plugin enhances server atmosphere without affecting gameplay mechanics. It's perfect for survival, faction, and community servers looking to add character to the player experience. The humorous messages can lighten the mood after a frustrating death, and the personal touch makes players feel more connected to your unique server environment. Unlike other death message plugins that may be overly complex or resource-intensive, CustomDeaths focuses on doing one thing exceptionally well. It's lightweight, intuitive to configure, and provides immediate value to both server administrators and players. Whether you're running a small private server or a large public community, CustomDeaths scales perfectly to your needs while maintaining simplicity and performance. Simply install, configure to match your server's tone, and watch as player deaths become moments of entertainment rather than frustration.
